---
title: "Schenberg Risk Toolkit"
subtitle: "A worked-example collection for the Schenberg pricing and risk framework"
---

Each chapter is a self-contained notebook that builds on the last — from a minimal
forward pricer to a full equity book with stressed scenarios.

| Chapter | Topic |
|---------|-------|
| 1 | Forward pricer — formula graph from scratch |
| 2 | Vanilla option — Black-Scholes pricer |
| 3 | Autodiff Greeks — JAX-powered sensitivities |
| 4 | Scenario VaR — Monte Carlo in one lazy plan |
| 5 | QuantLib benchmark — parity check against QL |
| 6 | Equity book — Router, PositionView, Fold, stress |

All code runs on **Polars lazy frames**; nothing is collected until the final call.
